rows.what_it_orders: signed statements about supply-chain artifacts in an append-only transparency log
rows.what_it_does_not: does not order an approval-friction checkpoint before an authority crossing, nor bind approver-key separation

rows.what_it_orders: supply-chain step metadata and materials/products link attestations
rows.what_it_does_not: does not attest a human/policy approval preceding a runtime authority boundary

rows.what_it_orders: inclusion and consistency of signed entries over time
rows.what_it_does_not: does not express a friction-before-authority precedence relation or a two-key pincer

rows.what_it_orders: a merge is gated on a human approval before code lands
rows.what_it_does_not: evidence is not offline-recomputable, not chain-ordered, not key-separated

rows.what_it_orders: policy decisions and violations over cluster state, logged for audit
rows.what_it_does_not: does not produce a signed, re-runnable receipt binding approval order to a specific crossing

rows.what_it_orders: receiver-attested confidential receipts per individual agent action
rows.what_it_does_not: is per-action; does not prove chain-level friction precedence or completeness census

rows.what_it_orders: an institutional-attestation governance model for autonomous actions
rows.what_it_does_not: is a model, not a recomputable friction-precedence receipt with policy-falsifiable exemptions

falsification_rule: any successful attack on a row triggers re-score at closeout
